description: Drupal layout builder field block displaying a student profile headline quote as an h1 element.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Student profile title with a motivational quote

props.quote: Your time at Sheffield will go by so quickly – so have fun!

stories.name: LongQuote
stories.description: Student profile title with a longer inspirational message

props.quote: Having studied geography at undergraduate level I had covered areas of urban planning and always wanted to explore it further

notes: This is a Drupal layout builder field block. The root div always carries the classes 'block block-layout-builder block-field-blocknodestudent-profiletitle'. The h1 contains the student's featured quote or headline, which varies per student. Related student profile field blocks (.block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-name, .block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-black-text-sub-header, .block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-grey-text-sub-header, .block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-intro, .block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-profile-image img, .block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-year) are separate independent Drupal blocks rendered as siblings on the same student profile page — they are not children of this block.
